mapper.sql: id, employee_number, last_name, lowest_dept_number, lowest_dept, l0_department_code, l0_department_cn_name, firstdeptcode, firstdept, seconddeptcode, seconddept, thirddeptcode, thirddept, fourthdeptcode, fourthdept, fifthdeptcode, fifthdept, sixthdeptcode, sixthdept, job_family, job_category, job_subcategory, target_credit, current_credit, personal_credit_completion_rate, dept_benchmark_completion_rate, credit_completion_date, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_personal_credit ( employee_number, last_name, lowest_dept_number, lowest_dept, l0_department_code, l0_department_cn_name, firstdeptcode, firstdept, seconddeptcode, seconddept, thirddeptcode, thirddept, fourthdeptcode, fourthdept, fifthdeptcode, fifthdept, sixthdeptcode, sixthdept, job_family, job_category, job_subcategory, target_credit, current_credit, personal_credit_completion_rate, dept_benchmark_completion_rate, credit_completion_date, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{employeeNumber}, #{lastName}, #{lowestDeptNumber}, #{lowestDept}, #{l0DepartmentCode}, #{l0DepartmentCnName}, #{firstdeptcode}, #{firstdept}, #{seconddeptcode}, #{seconddept}, #{thirddeptcode}, #{thirddept}, #{fourthdeptcode}, #{fourthdept}, #{fifthdeptcode}, #{fifthdept}, #{sixthdeptcode}, #{sixthdept}, #{jobFamily}, #{jobCategory}, #{jobSubcategory}, #{targetCredit}, #{currentCredit}, #{personalCreditCompletionRate}, #{deptBenchmarkCompletionRate}, #{creditCompletionDate}, NOW(), NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE last_name = VALUES(last_name), lowest_dept_number = VALUES(lowest_dept_number), lowest_dept = VALUES(lowest_dept), l0_department_code = VALUES(l0_department_code), l0_department_cn_name = VALUES(l0_department_cn_name), firstdeptcode = VALUES(firstdeptcode), firstdept = VALUES(firstdept), seconddeptcode = VALUES(seconddeptcode), seconddept = VALUES(seconddept), thirddeptcode = VALUES(thirddeptcode), thirddept = VALUES(thirddept), fourthdeptcode = VALUES(fourthdeptcode), fourthdept = VALUES(fourthdept), fifthdeptcode = VALUES(fifthdeptcode), fifthdept = VALUES(fifthdept), sixthdeptcode = VALUES(sixthdeptcode), sixthdept = VALUES(sixthdept), job_family = VALUES(job_family), job_category = VALUES(job_category), job_subcategory = VALUES(job_subcategory), target_credit = VALUES(target_credit), current_credit = VALUES(current_credit), personal_credit_completion_rate = VALUES(personal_credit_completion_rate), dept_benchmark_completion_rate = VALUES(dept_benchmark_completion_rate), credit_completion_date = IF(VALUES(credit_completion_date) IS NOT NULL, VALUES(credit_completion_date), credit_completion_date), update_time = NOW()

INSERT INTO t_personal_credit ( employee_number, last_name, lowest_dept_number, lowest_dept, l0_department_code, l0_department_cn_name, firstdeptcode, firstdept, seconddeptcode, seconddept, thirddeptcode, thirddept, fourthdeptcode, fourthdept, fifthdeptcode, fifthdept, sixthdeptcode, sixthdept, job_family, job_category, job_subcategory, target_credit, current_credit, personal_credit_completion_rate, dept_benchmark_completion_rate, credit_completion_date, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
( #{item.employeeNumber}, #{item.lastName}, #{item.lowestDeptNumber}, #{item.lowestDept}, #{item.l0DepartmentCode}, #{item.l0DepartmentCnName}, #{item.firstdeptcode}, #{item.firstdept}, #{item.seconddeptcode}, #{item.seconddept}, #{item.thirddeptcode}, #{item.thirddept}, #{item.fourthdeptcode}, #{item.fourthdept}, #{item.fifthdeptcode}, #{item.fifthdept}, #{item.sixthdeptcode}, #{item.sixthdept}, #{item.jobFamily}, #{item.jobCategory}, #{item.jobSubcategory}, #{item.targetCredit}, #{item.currentCredit}, #{item.personalCreditCompletionRate}, #{item.deptBenchmarkCompletionRate}, #{item.creditCompletionDate}, NOW(), NOW() )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE last_name = VALUES(last_name), lowest_dept_number = VALUES(lowest_dept_number), lowest_dept = VALUES(lowest_dept), l0_department_code = VALUES(l0_department_code), l0_department_cn_name = VALUES(l0_department_cn_name), firstdeptcode = VALUES(firstdeptcode), firstdept = VALUES(firstdept), seconddeptcode = VALUES(seconddeptcode), seconddept = VALUES(seconddept), thirddeptcode = VALUES(thirddeptcode), thirddept = VALUES(thirddept), fourthdeptcode = VALUES(fourthdeptcode), fourthdept = VALUES(fourthdept), fifthdeptcode = VALUES(fifthdeptcode), fifthdept = VALUES(fifthdept), sixthdeptcode = VALUES(sixthdeptcode), sixthdept = VALUES(sixthdept), job_family = VALUES(job_family), job_category = VALUES(job_category), job_subcategory = VALUES(job_subcategory), target_credit = VALUES(target_credit), current_credit = VALUES(current_credit), personal_credit_completion_rate = VALUES(personal_credit_completion_rate), dept_benchmark_completion_rate = VALUES(dept_benchmark_completion_rate), credit_completion_date = IF(VALUES(credit_completion_date) IS NOT NULL, VALUES(credit_completion_date), credit_completion_date), update_time = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE t_personal_credit SET dept_benchmark_completion_rate = #{benchmarkRate}, update_time = NOW() WHERE lowest_dept_number = #{lowestDeptNumber}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT lowest_dept_number FROM t_personal_credit WHERE lowest_dept_number IS NOT NULL AND lowest_dept_number != ''

SELECT job_category as categoryName, job_category as categoryCode, COUNT(*) as baselineHeadcount, MAX(current_credit) as maxScore, MIN(current_credit) as minScore, ROUND(AVG(current_credit), 2) as averageCurrentCredit, ROUND(AVG(target_credit), 2) as averageTargetCredit, SUM(CASE WHEN current_credit >= target_credit THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) as achievementRate FROM t_personal_credit WHERE job_category IS NOT NULL AND job_category != ''
AND ( l0_department_code = #{deptCode} OR firstdeptcode = #{deptCode} OR seconddeptcode = #{deptCode} OR thirddeptcode = #{deptCode} OR fourthdeptcode = #{deptCode} OR fifthdeptcode = #{deptCode} OR sixthdeptcode = #{deptCode} )
AND job_category LIKE '%干部%'
AND job_category LIKE '%专家%'
AND job_category LIKE '%主管%'
GROUP BY job_category

SELECT ${level} as categoryName, ${levelCode} as categoryCode, COUNT(*) as baselineHeadcount, MAX(current_credit) as maxScore, MIN(current_credit) as minScore, ROUND(AVG(current_credit), 2) as averageCurrentCredit, ROUND(AVG(target_credit), 2) as averageTargetCredit, SUM(CASE WHEN current_credit >= target_credit THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) as achievementRate FROM t_personal_credit WHERE ${level} IS NOT NULL AND ${level} != ''
AND ( l0_department_code = #{deptCode} OR firstdeptcode = #{deptCode} OR seconddeptcode = #{deptCode} OR thirddeptcode = #{deptCode} OR fourthdeptcode = #{deptCode} OR fifthdeptcode = #{deptCode} OR sixthdeptcode = #{deptCode} )
AND job_category LIKE '%干部%'
AND job_category LIKE '%专家%'
AND job_category LIKE '%主管%'
GROUP BY ${level}, ${levelCode}

SELECT '总计' as categoryName, COUNT(*) as baselineHeadcount, MAX(current_credit) as maxScore, MIN(current_credit) as minScore, ROUND(AVG(current_credit), 2) as averageCurrentCredit, ROUND(AVG(target_credit), 2) as averageTargetCredit, SUM(CASE WHEN current_credit >= target_credit THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) as achievementRate FROM t_personal_credit WHERE 1=1
AND ( l0_department_code = #{deptCode} OR firstdeptcode = #{deptCode} OR seconddeptcode = #{deptCode} OR thirddeptcode = #{deptCode} OR fourthdeptcode = #{deptCode} OR fifthdeptcode = #{deptCode} OR sixthdeptcode = #{deptCode} )
AND job_category LIKE '%干部%'
AND job_category LIKE '%专家%'
AND job_category LIKE '%主管%'

SELECT id, last_name AS name, employee_number AS employeeId, job_family AS jobFamily, job_category AS jobCategory, job_subcategory AS jobSubCategory, firstdept AS departmentLevel1, seconddept AS departmentLevel2, thirddept AS departmentLevel3, fourthdept AS departmentLevel4, fifthdept AS departmentLevel5, sixthdept AS departmentLevel6, CONCAT(lowest_dept, '/', lowest_dept_number) AS minDepartment, CASE WHEN cadre_position_ai_maturity IS NOT NULL AND cadre_position_ai_maturity != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isCadre, CASE WHEN expert_position_ai_maturity IS NOT NULL AND expert_position_ai_maturity != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isExpert, cadre_position_ai_maturity AS positionMaturity, current_credit AS currentCredits, personal_credit_completion_rate AS completionRate, dept_benchmark_completion_rate AS benchmarkRate, DATE_FORMAT(credit_completion_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS completionDate FROM t_personal_credit
ORDER BY personal_credit_completion_rate ASC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT expert_position_ai_maturity AS maturityLevel, COUNT(*) AS baseline, MAX(current_credit) AS maxCredits, MIN(current_credit) AS minCredits, ROUND(AVG(current_credit), 2) AS averageCredits, ROUND(AVG(target_credit), 2) AS targetCredits, ROUND( SUM(CASE WHEN current_credit >= target_credit THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2 ) AS completionRate FROM t_personal_credit WHERE expert_position_ai_maturity IS NOT NULL AND expert_position_ai_maturity != ''
AND ( l0_department_code = #{deptCode} OR firstdeptcode = #{deptCode} OR seconddeptcode = #{deptCode} OR thirddeptcode = #{deptCode} OR fourthdeptcode = #{deptCode} OR fifthdeptcode = #{deptCode} OR sixthdeptcode = #{deptCode} )
GROUP BY expert_position_ai_maturity ORDER BY expert_position_ai_maturity

SELECT cadre_position_ai_maturity AS maturityLevel, COUNT(*) AS baseline, MAX(current_credit) AS maxCredits, MIN(current_credit) AS minCredits, ROUND(AVG(current_credit), 2) AS averageCredits, ROUND(AVG(target_credit), 2) AS targetCredits, ROUND( SUM(CASE WHEN current_credit >= target_credit THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2 ) AS completionRate FROM t_personal_credit WHERE cadre_position_ai_maturity IS NOT NULL AND cadre_position_ai_maturity != ''
AND ( l0_department_code = #{deptCode} OR firstdeptcode = #{deptCode} OR seconddeptcode = #{deptCode} OR thirddeptcode = #{deptCode} OR fourthdeptcode = #{deptCode} OR fifthdeptcode = #{deptCode} OR sixthdeptcode = #{deptCode} )
GROUP BY cadre_position_ai_maturity ORDER BY cadre_position_ai_maturity
